spells.name: Projected Light
spells.notes: Beam of light (like a flashlight) springs from the caster’s palm; it has a 50' effective range. If the caster’s hand is closed into a fist, the light will “turn off”. If the caster’s fist is reopened before the end of the duration, the light will turn on again.

spells.name: Light I
spells.notes: Lights a 10'R area about the point touched. This spell may be cast onto a target as explained in Section 10.17.

spells.name: Aura
spells.notes: Causes a bright aura about the target, providing a more powerful appearance and subtracting 10 from all attacks on the target.

spells.name: Lights II
spells.notes: As Light I, except 1 or 2 areas can be created with a total radius of 20' (e.g., one area of 20'R or two areas of 10’R) and the location(s) for the light(s) need not be touched.

spells.name: Sudden Light
spells.notes: Causes a 10'R burst of intense light, all within are stunned (-50) for 1 round per 10 failure.

spells.name: True Aura
spells.notes: As Aura, except it produces an extremely powerful appearance and subtracts 15 from all attacks.

spells.name: Shock Bolt I
spells.notes: A bolt of intense, charged light is shot from the palm of the caster; results are determined on the Lightning Bolt attack table, as a Miniscule attack.

spells.name: Lights III
spells.notes: As Lights II, except up to three areas can be created with a total radius of 30'.

spells.name: Utterlight I
spells.notes: Nullifies all magically created darkness in a 10'R, and lights that area as full daylight.

spells.name: Waiting Light
spells.notes: As Light I, except caster can delay the spell up to 24 hours; it can be triggered by one of the following (decided by caster): elapsed time, specific movements, specific sounds, touch, etc.

spells.name: Flare
spells.notes: A ball of light one foot in diameter is shot from the palm of the caster: it will travel to the limit of Long range, explode (as a flare), burn with a bright light (as a flare), drift slowly to earth, and go out. An area equal to the range is lit if the flare can rise to its full range; drops 10'/round. It can be fired at a target as a Small Fire Bolt.

spells.name: Illumination II
spells.notes: As Lights II, except duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Lights V
spells.notes: As Lights II, except up to five areas can be created with a total radius of 50'.

spells.name: Utterlight III
spells.notes: As Utterlight I, except up to three areas can be created with a total radius of 30'

spells.name: Lights X
spells.notes: As Lights II, except up to ten areas can be created with a total radius of 100'.

spells.name: Illumination III
spells.notes: As Lights III, except duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Utterlight V
spells.notes: As Utterlight I, except up to five areas can be created with a total radius of 50'

spells.name: Mass Lights
spells.notes: As Lights II, except total radius is 10' per level and this may be split between a number of areas equal to the caster’s level.

spells.name: Illumination V
spells.notes: As Lights V, except duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Mass Aura
spells.notes: As Aura, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Shock Ball
spells.notes: Caster extends a finger and a 1" globe of blue-white light shoots out to the target location, then erupts in arcs of electricity in a 40' sphere. Attack is resolved on the Lightning Ball table as a Miniscule attack.

spells.name: Alkar
spells.notes: As Aura, except target seems like a minor god and the subtraction is 25.

spells.name: Mass True Aura
spells.notes: As True Aura, except as many targets as the caster’s level can be affected.

spells.name: Mass Illumination
spells.notes: As Mass Lights, except duration is one hour per level.

spells.name: Mass Utterlights
spells.notes: As Utterlight I, except total radius is 10' per level and this may be split between a number of areas equal to the caster’s level.
